description: Review-only contract for future local KosmoOrbit identity, profile and session boundaries.
identity_principles: Local identity belongs to the office and must stay under human and IT/KI control.
Profiles describe responsibility and interface depth before they describe permissions.
Learning profiles must be protective by default and escalate to a supervising human.
Every persistent profile, session log or preference needs privacy, retention and backup rules before implementation.

profile_classes.required_human_gate: Owner confirms live, public and cost decisions explicitly.
profile_classes.privacy_requirement: Owner decisions must be auditable without exposing private credentials.

profile_classes.required_human_gate: IT/KI confirms local runtime readiness; owner confirms costs and external accounts.
profile_classes.privacy_requirement: Diagnostics must hide secrets, tokens, private project paths and personal data.

profile_classes.required_human_gate: Project lead confirms project-local decisions before design, draw or publish handoff.
profile_classes.privacy_requirement: Project notes need project-level retention, anonymisation and backup rules.

profile_classes.required_human_gate: Design/drawing actions need project lead or model-quality review before writes.
profile_classes.privacy_requirement: Design preferences may not become hidden approvals or automatic generation consent.

profile_classes.required_human_gate: Every project-impacting step escalates to a supervising human.
profile_classes.privacy_requirement: Learning profiles must avoid grades, surveillance, personal scoring and public exposure.

session_boundaries.today: The browser can switch preview roles without writing user data.
session_boundaries.future_requirement: Persisted sessions need local storage rules, timeout, operator visibility and manual logout.

session_boundaries.today: Review decisions are drafts and evidence summaries only.
session_boundaries.future_requirement: Decision records need signer, timestamp, evidence, rollback and retention policy.

session_boundaries.today: Learning mode explains and guides without writing scores.
session_boundaries.future_requirement: Training history needs explicit consent, guardian/school boundary where relevant and delete/export rules.

promotion_requirements: Local identity schema with role, profile depth, consent and retention fields.
Privacy review for office data, project notes, learning data and audit logs.
Local storage and backup policy approved by owner and IT/KI.
Manual account recovery and offboarding process.
Clear distinction between UI preference, review permission and legal approval.
Browser and local-runtime tests that prove no hidden external identity provider is used.
next_actions: Use this contract before implementing real auth, profile persistence or session storage.
Keep role switching as browser preview until local identity storage is explicitly designed.
Use the profile classes to connect Workstation Profiles, Permission Matrix and Audit Trail.
